description_long: This is a modern rectangular desk with a light wood finish and a sturdy metal frame. The desk features a spacious flat work surface and two integrated drawers on the right side, one of which has a lock, providing secure storage for personal or office items. The left side of the desk is supported by a solid panel, while the right side is supported by a metal leg, giving it a contemporary, asymmetrical look. The drawers have sleek, recessed handles for a minimalist appearance. The overall design is clean and functional, suitable for professional or home office environments. The materials and construction suggest durability and ease of maintenance.
description: A modern, light wood desk with metal legs, two right-side drawers (one lockable), and a clean, minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full work surface, two right-side drawers with handles, and the solid left panel support.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the solid left panel and the depth of the desk, with no drawers visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain back panel and the open leg frame on the right side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the open metal frame on the right and the solid left panel, with the top surface visible.
attribute_orientation: The user-facing side features two drawers on the right and a solid panel on the left, with the open leg frame on the right side for legroom.
attribute_usage_context: computer workstation or writing desk for office or home office use
